message:
test(fcp-mesh): expand symbol_request and degraded module tests (+27 tests)

symbol_request.rs: +15 tests covering constants validation, all error
variant Display impls, AdmissionError conversion, policy custom values,
handler constructor, metrics tracking (targeted/ack), and SymbolResponse
field edge cases.

degraded.rs: +12 tests covering DegradedTransportError Display for all
variants, ControlPlaneEnvelope field access and ephemeral retention,
encoder frame_seq behavior, decoder initial state, and handler edge
cases (empty epochs, unknown zone, count).

Total fcp-mesh tests: 550 → 577

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
